category.scope_note: Portable and hand-held electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Brazil, including chargers, external power supplies, and integral or detachable battery packs.

title.en: China-to-Brazil Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Brazil requirements: INMETRO compulsory certification via Portaria, ABNT NBR IEC 62841 safety, EMC and electrical safety, ANATEL homologation for cordless radio, restricted substances and battery handling, and importer CNPJ obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与巴西要求差距对照：经 Portaria 的 INMETRO 强制认证、ABNT NBR IEC 62841 安全、电磁兼容与电气安全、无绳无线电的 ANATEL 核准、限用物质与电池处理，以及进口商 CNPJ 义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與巴西要求差距對照：經 Portaria 的 INMETRO 強制認證、ABNT NBR IEC 62841 安全、電磁相容與電氣安全、無繩無線電的 ANATEL 核准、限用物質與電池處理，以及進口商 CNPJ 義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited certification-body (OCP) assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current INMETRO Portarias, ABNT NBR standards, ANATEL homologation rules, and Brazilian enforcement practice with qualified professionals and an in-country importer before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可认证机构（OCP）评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士及在地进口商核验现行 INMETRO Portaria、ABNT NBR 标准、ANATEL 核准规则及巴西执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可認證機構（OCP）評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士及在地進口商核驗現行 INMETRO Portaria、ABNT NBR 標準、ANATEL 核准規則及巴西執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Brazil, the mandatory baseline is INMETRO compulsory conformity certification under the applicable Portaria using ABNT NBR IEC 62841 safety testing through an accredited OCP, EMC and electrical safety for the 127/220 V 60 Hz grid, ANATEL homologation for cordless radio modules, restricted-substance and battery handling, and an in-country importer holding a CNPJ; there is no Brazilian equivalent of the EU outdoor-noise directive, so noise is handled through general product-safety and ABNT requirements rather than a stand-alone noise mark.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入巴西，强制基线是依适用 Portaria 通过认可 OCP 以 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 安全测试完成 INMETRO 强制符合性认证、面向 127/220 V 60 Hz 电网的电磁兼容与电气安全、无绳无线电模块的 ANATEL 核准、限用物质与电池处理，以及持有 CNPJ 的在地进口商；巴西没有等同欧盟户外噪声指令的法规，因此噪声经一般产品安全和 ABNT 要求处理，而非独立的噪声标志。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入巴西，強制基線是依適用 Portaria 通過認可 OCP 以 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 安全測試完成 INMETRO 強制符合性認證、面向 127/220 V 60 Hz 電網的電磁相容與電氣安全、無繩無線電模組的 ANATEL 核准、限用物質與電池處理，以及持有 CNPJ 的在地進口商；巴西沒有等同歐盟戶外噪聲指令的法規，因此噪聲經一般產品安全和 ABNT 要求處理，而非獨立的噪聲標誌。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on any change to a cited INMETRO Portaria, ABNT NBR standard, or ANATEL homologation rule.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, accredited certification body, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
